name: WinRed Republican Fundraising API
what_it_does: WinRed REST API for Republican and conservative political fundraising platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve donation records and donor data, access campaign contribution summaries, sync donor information with GOP data systems, retrieve recurring contribution status, access FEC-compliant transaction exports, manage refund data, and integrate fundraising data with campaign finance reporting and compliance systems.
use_cases: Retrieving Republican campaign donation records from finance compliance agents
Accessing contribution totals and fundraising analytics from campaign finance agents
Retrieving recurring donation status from donor stewardship agents
Syncing donor data with GOP data tools from campaign organizing agents
not_for: Democratic or progressive political fundraising (WinRed is exclusively Republican/conservative aligned)
General nonprofit without Republican political donation compliance focus
Commercial payment processing without political fundraising compliance
best_when: A Republican campaign, conservative PAC, or conservative organization using WinRed wants AI agents to automate donation tracking, donor data sync, and FEC compliance reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Political donation data is subject to FEC reporting requirements and heightened privacy. Donor identity for political contributions is sensitive and regulated.

auth.notes: WinRed uses API key authentication. Committee-level credentials per political organization. API access requires WinRed account and approval. Webhooks for real-time contribution notifications.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for campaigns; WinRed takes a processing fee percentage
pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage-based processing fees on donations; no monthly SaaS fee
pricing.notes: Washington DC. Founded 2019 as Republican answer to ActBlue. NRCC/RNC backed. Dominant Republican online fundraising platform. Processed $1B+ in contributions. Mandatory for NRCC-supported candidates in many cycles. Counterpart to ActBlue for GOP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Political donation data subject to FEC reporting and heightened privacy
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
Republican-exclusive platform — Democratic campaigns must use ActBlue
FEC compliance requirements — contribution limit validation and disclosure rules apply
No granular scopes — credential grants full committee access
Limited public developer documentation compared to ActBlue
agent_readiness.security_notes: Political donation and donor identity data. PCI-DSS, FEC. API key. US data residency. Republican-exclusive. FEC disclosure requirements mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Political donation data with FEC requirements. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Republican platform. FEC compliance mandatory.
